_comment: audit-ignore.json — configurable control-plane exclusion rules for Trust Checker.
Edit this file to add/remove paths without touching any source code.
All four arrays are optional. Missing or null entries are skipped silently.
exactPaths      : exact pathname matches (case-sensitive, leading slash required)
prefixPaths     : pathname prefix matches (request path must start with this value)
urlPatterns     : regex patterns matched against the full request URL (JS regex syntax, no flags needed)
trustedThirdPartyDomains : external domains treated as trusted infra (fonts, CDN, etc.)
highRiskThirdPartyDomains: external domains to flag when they carry substantial payloads
NOTE: /cdn-cgi/* already covers Cloudflare services including Turnstile (human verification),
RUM (Real User Monitoring), and other CDN features.
